name: aigc-mas
description: AIGC Multi-Agent Service Platform - 深度垂直服务于视频制作场景

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @aigc-mas/server" "npm run dev -w @aigc-mas/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @aigc-mas/shared && npm run build -w @aigc-mas/server && npm run build -w @aigc-mas/client
scripts.build:client: npm run build -w @aigc-mas/shared && npm run build -w @aigc-mas/client
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
